proof: function[T0: Zero, T1: Zero] { Zero.0[Pair[T0, T1]] = Pair.zero[T0, T1] }[A, B]

goal: p + (q + r) = pair_add[A, B](p, q + r)

goal: forall(x0: Pair[A, B], x1: Pair[A, B], x2: Pair[A, B]) { Add.add(x0, Add.add(x1, x2)) = Add.add(Add.add(x0, x1), x2) }
proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k0: Pair[A, B], k1: Pair[A, B]) { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](k0, k1)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, k0), k1) } }
let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k2: Pair[A, B]) { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w1, k2)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, w1), k2) } }
let w2: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w1, w2)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, w1), w2) }

let w4: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w3, w4)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, w3), w4) }
let w5: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w3, w5)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, w3), w5) }

Zero.0[Pair[A, B]] + p = pair_add[A, B](pair_zero[A, B], p)
forall(x0: Pair[A, B]) { Add.add(Zero.0[Pair[A, B]], x0) = x0 }
proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Zero.0[Pair[A, B]], w0) != w0 }
function[T0: Add, T1: Add](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { Add.add[Pair[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[A, B](Zero.0[Pair[A, B]], w0)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Zero.0[Pair[T0, T1]] + x0 = x0 }[A, B](w0)

goal: forall(x0: Pair[A, B]) { Add.add(x0, Zero.0[Pair[A, B]]) = x0 }

p + Neg.neg[Pair[A, B]](p) != Zero.0[Pair[A, B]]
p + Neg.neg[Pair[A, B]](p) = Zero.0[Pair[A, B]]

goal: forall(x0: Pair[A, B]) { Add.add(x0, Neg.neg(x0)) = Zero.0[Pair[A, B]] }
proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w0, Neg.neg[Pair[A, B]](w0)) != Zero.0[Pair[A, B]] }
function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Add.add[Pair[T0, T1]](x0, Neg.neg[Pair[T0, T1]](x0)) = Zero.0[Pair[T0, T1]] }[A, B](w0)

p * (q + r) = pair_mul[A, B](p, pair_add[A, B](q, r))
p * q + p * r = pair_add[A, B](p * q, p * r)

(p + q) * r = pair_mul[A, B](p + q, r)

p * Zero.0[Pair[A, B]] = pair_mul[A, B](p, pair_zero[A, B])

let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k2: Pair[A, B]) { Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w1, k2)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, w1), Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, k2)) } }

let w3: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k3: Pair[A, B]) { Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w3, k3)) != Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, w3), Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, k3)) } }

let w5: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Add.add[Pair[A, B]](Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, w3), Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, w5)) != Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](w0, Add.add[Pair[A, B]](w3, w5)) }

proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { Mul.mul[Pair[A, B]](Zero.0[Pair[A, B]], w0) != Zero.0[Pair[A, B]] }
function[T0: Semiring, T1: Semiring](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Zero.0[Pair[T0, T1]] * x0 = Zero.0[Pair[T0, T1]] }[A, B](w0)
function[T0: Mul, T1: Mul](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[Pair[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[A, B](Zero.0[Pair[A, B]], w0)
